YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_DAGGER.description: A [gold]Stance[/gold]. When you attack with a [gold]Dagger[/gold] card, apply 1 [gold]Bleed[/gold] to the target. Playing a [gold]Dagger[/gold] card grants 1 [gold]Dagger[/gold] stack, up to 12. On exit, deal 4 damage to a random enemy, repeated equal to your [gold]Dagger[/gold] stacks.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_DAGGER.title: Dagger
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_AXE.description: A [gold]Stance[/gold]. [gold]Axe[/gold] cards generally have high damage. Playing an [gold]Axe[/gold] card grants 1 [gold]Axe[/gold] stack, up to 8. On exit, deal [gold]Axe[/gold] stacks × 8 damage to the enemy with the highest HP.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_AXE.title: Axe
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_GUN.description: A [gold]Stance[/gold]. [gold]Gun[/gold] cards generally have low damage with high hit counts. Playing a [gold]Gun[/gold] card grants 1 [gold]Gun[/gold] stack, up to 6. On exit, deal 4 damage to ALL enemies, repeated equal to your [gold]Gun[/gold] stacks.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_GUN.title: Gun
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_SWORD.description: A [gold]Stance[/gold]. Playing a [gold]Sword[/gold] card grants 1 [gold]Sword[/gold] stack, up to 1. On exit, gain 2 Energy.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_SWORD.title: Sword
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_LING_HUO.description: When a card with [gold]LingHuo[/gold] is sent from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] or [gold]hand[/gold] to your [gold]discard pile[/gold], play it. If the card has a post-[gold]LingHuo[/gold] effect, it is not played and instead triggers that effect.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_LING_HUO.title: Nimble
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_FORESEE.description: Look at the top X cards of your [gold]draw pile[/gold]. send any number of them to your [gold]discard pile[/gold]. The rest remain on top in their original order.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_FORESEE.title: Foresee
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_STANCE.description: There are four [gold]Stances[/gold]: [gold]Dagger[/gold], [gold]Axe[/gold], [gold]Gun[/gold], and [gold]Sword[/gold]. You can only have one [gold]Stance[/gold] at a time. Playing a card with a [gold]Stance[/gold] keyword enters that stance. If you already have another [gold]Stance[/gold], you first exit it, triggering its exit effect, then enter the new [gold]Stance[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_STANCE.title: Stance
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_RETRIEVER.description: Select a number of cards from a specific [gold]card pool[/gold] and add them to your hand.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_RETRIEVER.title: Retrieve
